description: Gemini Strategy D retest — changed from 503 to 400 Bad Request with JSON error body. Previous #349 showed UI freeze with 503. Check if 400 triggers Gemini's error handling UI instead of freezing.
expected_behavior: Gemini frontend should display an error message or toast instead of freezing in 'generating' state
notes: If 400 still freezes, try: (1) 200 OK with empty webchannel response, (2) 429 Too Many Requests
